title: Sales & Business Development Representative (m/w/d)
matched_skills: B2B sales — supported by IPC and GRG roles with direct B2B client engagement
English & German communication — C1 English; German B1+
Self-organized / autonomous work — evidenced across multiple self-directed project roles
Needs analysis / consultative selling — market & competitive analysis, voice-of-customer research
LinkedIn prospecting — LinkedIn used for lead identification
missing_skills: Kaltakquise / Cold calling — no direct outbound cold calling experience mentioned
HubSpot CRM — not listed in tools
Appointment setting — no explicit evidence of qualifying leads and booking sales meetings
IT / custom software sales context — no prior software or IT services sales background
core_responsibilities: Identify potential customers via LinkedIn who fit the company's positioning
Contact prospects via phone, email, and LinkedIn (outbound outreach)
Maintain lead lists and contacts in HubSpot CRM
Analyse prospect needs and outline how custom software could improve their business
Qualify decision-makers and schedule appointments with IT consultants
recommended_emphasis: Highlight B2B client-facing experience from IPC and GRG — pre-sales demos, lead capture at trade fairs
Reframe business development role at ECE as lead identification and opportunity sourcing
Emphasise German language use in professional contexts
Stress self-directed, autonomous working style throughout project roles
Mention any CRM or contact management tooling used and express willingness to adopt HubSpot
Leverage Agile/Scrum background to align with stated agile company culture
